name: Discern Secrets
description:
Your patron deigns to whisper a few secrets. The target can , , or as a free action. The target gains a +1 status bonus to the statistic used for the roll (a skill or Perception), as long as you Sustain the spell. The target is temporarily immune to discern secrets for 1 minute.

Heightened (5th) You can target two creatures instead of one.
